title.en: Ensure audit tools group owner is configured

prose.en: Ensure audit tools group owner is configured

description.en: Audit tools include, but are not limited to, vendor\-provided and open source audit tools needed to successfully view and manipulate audit information system activity and records. Audit tools include custom queries and report generators.

rationale.en: Protecting audit information includes identifying and protecting the tools used to view and manipulate log data. Protecting audit tools is necessary to prevent unauthorized operation on audit information.

audit.en:
Run the following command to change group ownership to the groop `root`:

```
# chgrp root /sbin/auditctl /sbin/aureport /sbin/ausearch /sbin/autrace /sbin/auditd /sbin/augenrules
```

remediation.en:
Run the following command to change group ownership to the groop `root`:

```
# chgrp root /sbin/auditctl /sbin/aureport /sbin/ausearch /sbin/autrace /sbin/auditd /sbin/augenrules
```
